name: Slider
about_this_pattern: A slider is an input where the user selects a value from within a given range. Sliders typically have a slider thumb that can be moved along a bar, rail, or track to change the value of the slider.

keyboard_interactions.description: Increase the value of the slider by one step.
Increase the value of the slider by one step.
Decrease the value of the slider by one step.
Decrease the value of the slider by one step.
Set the slider to the first allowed value in its range.
Set the slider to the last allowed value in its range.
Increase the slider value by an amount larger than the step change made by Up Arrow.
Decrease the slider value by an amount larger than the step change made by Down Arrow.
